author: Psychiatry
text:
Bound op-log lines to PIPE_BUF for atomic concurrent appends

Enforce SPEC §1's atomicity claim: hold each unified-log JSON line at or below PIPE_BUF (4096B) so a single O_APPEND never interleaves with a parallel agent's. The unbounded enveloped plugin-stderr msg (§6) is truncated on a char boundary with a marker; lock-free fast path kept, no flock. Records the bound in §1 and a §15 entry.
